name: agent-review-pipeline
description: Autonomous code review pipeline with asymmetric dual-engine dispatch. Codex runs ARP's correctness + adversarial framings (2 dispatches); Gemini runs its own /ce:review compound-engineering pipeline (1 dispatch). Confidence-weighted consensus, bounded auto-fix loop, loop-thrash kill switch, safe-off defaults.

maxIterations.title: Max Iterations
maxIterations.description: Max auto-fix retry loops before escalating. Range: 1-10. Unlimited is intentionally not supported (cost safety).

failOnError.title: Fail On Error
failOnError.description: If true, abort pipeline when a stage can't PASS within maxIterations instead of escalating.

defaultEngine.title: Default Engine
defaultEngine.description: Engine selection when none specified on CLI. Values: both, gemini, codex.

geminiModel.title: Gemini Model
geminiModel.description: Model passed to gemini CLI via -m flag. Verify supported models with 'gemini models list'.

autoCommit.title: Auto Commit Fixes
autoCommit.description: If true, autonomously commit fixes at the end of the pipeline. Default false for safety — user should review before committing.

postPrComment.title: Post PR Comment
postPrComment.description: If true, auto-post executive summary to the GitHub PR via 'gh pr comment'. Default false — review output locally first before making public.

dryRun.title: Dry Run
dryRun.description: If true, run review stages and print findings + proposed fixes without applying any Edit, commit, or PR comment.
